name: Dutch Spiced Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut steak into 4 pieces; rub with salt and pepper.
2. Heat butter in a large frying pan until hot but not brown.
3. Brown meat on both sides; remove to a platter.
4. Add sliced onions to the frying pan and fry lightly; remove from pan.
5. Add water to the frying pan, scraping the pan to loosen any bits of beef.
6. Return meat to the pan; cover with onion slices.
7. Add vinegar, mustard, bay leaf, and cloves. Cover and cook slowly for 1 1/2 hours or until tender, turning every 1/2 hour.
8. Place steaks on a serving platter. Remove bay leaf and cloves, placing onions on the platter.
9. Garnish each steak with one spiced onion and three pimiento strips.
